Interface IRasterCommand

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to member that control a raster command.

[Guid("7015C99D-2F08-44F9-88F0-8F85A766CB2B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterCommand

Argument

The command argument(s).

object Argument { get; }

Property Value

object

ID

The command ID.

int ID { get; }

int

Name

The command name, e.g. CalculateStatistics, BuildPyramids, and etc.
